ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_alpha2" TEXT /* 2-letter ISO code for the country */,
  "iso_alpha3" TEXT /* 3-letter ISO code for the country */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the continent where the country is located */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the country is located */,
  "dev_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the development status of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "independence_date" TEXT /* Date of independence for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_dev_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("dev_status_id") REFERENCES development_status ("dev_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the continent in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the continent where the region is located */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_status" (
  "dev_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development status */,
  "dev_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the development status (developed or developing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the development status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dev_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country in the given year */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population of the country in the given year */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population of the country in the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_data" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the GDP data */,
  "gdp_nominal" INTEGER /* Nominal GDP of the country in the given year */,
  "gdp_ppp" INTEGER /* GDP (PPP) of the country in the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_rates" (
  "poverty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty rate data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the poverty rate data */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the country in the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poverty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
